nodes.name: Louisiade monarch
nodes.summary: The Louisiade monarch (Symposiachrus melanopterus) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae endemic to Papua New Guinea. It is found in the Louisiade Archipelago. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss. Taxonomy and systematics The species was originally described as a species by George Robert Gray as Monarcha melanoptera, later as a subspecies of the spectacled monarch. References Gill F, D Donsker & P Rasmussen (Eds). 2022. IOC World Bird List (v12.1). doi : 10.14344/IOC.ML.12.1

nodes.name: 路易西亞德群島
nodes.summary: 路易西亞德群島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Torresian imperial pigeon、Purple-bellied lory、White-chinned myzomela等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。
